title: Add JSDoc to all backend class methods
description: PRD §5 gap: backend class methods lack JSDoc documentation. Add JSDoc comments to all public methods on: AgenticStoreBackend, OPFSBackend, NodeFsBackend, MemoryStorage, LocalStorageBackend, SQLiteBackend. Methods to document: get, set, delete, list, scan, scanStream, batchGet, batchSet, stat. Reference the existing JSDoc patterns on AgenticFileSystem public methods and the StorageBackend interface in types.ts.
